content:
# Rytr vs Writesonic vs Copy.ai: Best AI Writer for Business 2026

Choosing the right AI writing tool for your business can be overwhelming. Let's compare the three most popular options!

Check out our [[link:/category/Writing|Writing category]] for more AI tools.

---

## [[link:/tools/23|Rytr]]: The Budget-Friendly Champion

[[link:/tools/23|Rytr]] offers exceptional value with 40+ templates at just $9/month.

### Rytr Strengths
- **Unbeatable price**: Best value at $9/month
- **40+ templates**: Cover almost every use case
- **Built-in plagiarism checker**: Included free
- **30+ languages**: Great for global teams

**Try Rytr Free**: {{AFFILIATE_RYTR}}

---

## Writesonic: The Feature-Rich Option

Writesonic offers extensive features including an Article Writer and Chatsonic.

### Writesonic Strengths
- **Article Writer**: Long-form content generation
- **Chatsonic**: Chatbot with web access
- **Good templates**: Wide variety of formats

---

## Copy.ai: The Enterprise Choice

Copy.ai focuses on enterprise features and workflow automation.

### Copy.ai Strengths
- **Workflow automation**: Integrate with business tools
- **Brand Voice**: Maintain consistency
- **Collaboration**: Team features built-in

---

## Comparison Table

| Feature | [[link:/tools/23|Rytr]] | Writesonic | Copy.ai |
|---------|-----------|-----------|---------|
| Price | $9/mo | $12/mo | $36/mo |
| Templates | 40+ | 80+ | 90+ |
| Languages | 30+ | 25+ | 25+ |
| Plagiarism Checker | Yes | Separate | Separate |
| Long-form | Good | Excellent | Good |

---

## Our Recommendations

- **Budget-conscious**: Choose [[link:/tools/23|Rytr]]
- **Long-form content**: Try Writesonic
- **Enterprise teams**: Go with Copy.ai

Want more comparisons? Check out [[link:/blog/claude-vs-gemini-vs-chatgpt-ultimate-ai-comparison-2026|Claude vs Gemini vs ChatGPT]]
